title: CSS Fonts
abstract: CSS Fonts defines web font selection, font faces and typographic behavior for digital interfaces and web documents.
description: A technology record for browser typography and reading systems.
roleInEcosystem: CSS Fonts supports durable web typography for long-form articles, knowledge pages and accessible reading systems.
bodyHtml:
Role

CSS Fonts is part of the web platform’s typographic layer. It helps browsers select and render typefaces across devices.

Use

Electronic Artefacts can treat typography as part of knowledge infrastructure: readable articles, stable hierarchy and accessible layout.

References

See the W3C CSS Fonts specification.
